perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a toy box for a remote control dinosaur in a retail warehouse. A hand points at the back of the box, illustrating the remote control's fossil-like design. (2) The camera pans upward to show a Costco price tag for an 'AOSGA DINO' priced at $699. (3) A young woman appears on screen holding the large toy box; she smiles and examines the dinosaur toy visible through the transparent window. (4) Close-up shots of the box art highlight features like water-spraying, 360-degree rotation, and color variants. (5) The woman walks through the aisles of the warehouse while continuing to showcase the toy's packaging to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy, upbeat electronic pop track starts immediately. A female voice speaks in enthusiastic Mandarin about the coolness of the remote control. (2) A male voice enters the audio track, speaking off-camera, engaging in a playful dialogue with the woman about buying the toy and its cost. (3) The female voice continues to describe the toy's functions (spraying, moving), interspersed with occasional dinosaur roaring sound effects and warehouse ambient noise. (4) The music remains consistent in tempo as the two speakers laugh and conclude their discussion about the toy's target age range.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Costco Wholesale' logo is fixed at the top. '妹妹說他想要' (Sister says she wants it) appears as a hook. (2) '這是他遙控器帥爆了' (This remote control is awesome) appears as functional dialogue text. (3) '$699' and '歡樂的小孩' (Happy child) appear in stylized yellow font. (4) '噴霧遙控跳舞恐龍' (Spray remote control dancing dinosaur) describes the product. (5) '阿柔一定會氣炸' (A-Rou will be furious) appears as a humorous, emotive caption. (6) '普通級就是1-99歲' (General rating is 1-99 years old) appears as concluding humorous text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Product discovery) -> Detail demonstration -> Conclusion (Decision to purchase)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible; 1 male voice heard but not seen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a lavender-colored blouse with puff sleeves.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving, stacked cardboard boxes, and signage for the meat and seafood sections.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Exploration -> Purchase Decision
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a lifestyle 'shopping find' vlog entry, highlighting a specific toy available at Costco. The content combines product review elements with personal interaction, aiming to entertain and inform followers about interesting or high-value items in the store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showing of the price tag, brand features, and positive verbal recommendation of the product's 'cool' factor.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of variety-show style Traditional Chinese captions and beat-synced fast editing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the popularity of Costco-themed content in Taiwan, focusing on 'treasure hunting' for unique toys.
